actions.expression:
SELECT cghtsheet.sid,
       cghtsheet.wxht,
       cghtsheet.khhh,
       cghtsheet.krtm,
       cght.sccj1id,
       cght.sccj,
       cghtsheet.gchh,
       cghtsheet.cgjg,
       cghtsheet.ljrk,
       cghtsheet.zje,
       cghtsheet.sl,
       cghtsheet.jldw,
       cghtsheet.zwdw,
       cghtsheet.qdl,
       cghtsheet.hgbm,
       cghtsheet.zhwbgpm,
       cght.htrq,
       cght.cgry,
       cght.bz,
       cghtsheet.zhwbzh,
       cghtsheet.bzhfsh,
       cghtsheet.topcz,
       cghtsheet.bottomcz,
       cghtsheet.Coating,
       cghtsheet.qtcz,
       cghtsheet.houd,
       cghtsheet.wypp,
       cghtsheet.ggwy,
       cghtsheet.czwy,
       cghtsheet.yswy,
       cghtsheet.wysm,
       cghtsheet.nhrl,
       cghtsheet.nhwx,
       cghtsheet.wxrl,
       cghtsheet.bzcd,
       cghtsheet.bzkd,
       cghtsheet.bzgd,
       cghtsheet.tj,
       cghtsheet.bzdw,
       cghtsheet.cpfl,
       cghtsheet.yjfl,
       cghtsheet.ejfl,
       cghtsheet.sjfl,
       cghtsheet.flmc,
       cghtsheet.ks,
       cghtsheet.zzsl,
       cghtsheet.mz,
       cghtsheet.jz,
       cghtsheet.kz,
       cghtsheet.chpchc,
       cghtsheet.ggyy,
       cghtsheet.cpgg,
       cghtsheet.yse,
       cghtsheet.ysyy,
       cght.rkdd,
       cght.kh_id,
       cghtsheet.cgsl,
       cghtsheet.hthm
FROM cght,cghtsheet 
WHERE (cght.rid=cghtsheet.pid) 
  AND (cght.xjht="新") 
  AND ((cght.cgsh="1") 
  OR (cght.sfhz="通过")) 
  AND (cghtsheet.bjhh=[专属产品.产品编号]) 
ORDER BY cghtsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.bm,sys_user.path 
FROM ywrybiao 
LEFT JOIN sys_user on sys_user.username=ywrybiao.yhm 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[专属产品.共享业务.业务人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

FROM gckm 
WHERE (gckm.cpbh=[专属产品.产品编号])

ORDER BY gckm.sid ASC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT DISTINCT  khsheet3.kh_id,company_name 
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)

   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

actions.expression:
SELECT DISTINCT khsheet3.kh_id,khsheet3.company_name 
FROM khsheet3 
WHERE ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_) 
  OR (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_) 
  OR (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) 
  AND (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")
